meaning: n.亚麻布,亚麻制品,亚麻纤维制成的优质纸adj.亚麻布制的,亚麻的
examples: From it he took a large, heavy linen bag and brought it to the child.
In the late 17th century, French refugees arrived here and developed the linen industry.
Like other cities, Orlando has seen big national chain closures like Linen-N-Things and Circuit City.
Howell went on to make an unlined linen jacket, and then trousers using a robust corduroy.
